bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Daggers are dying to spears/shields due to excessive flank-deferral and passive retreats. Setting flankMaxDeferTicks=0 forces immediate engagement when backstabs aren't guaranteed, reducing exposure. Raising targetThreatAversion to 100 prevents reckless dives into high-threat spear users. Disabling

lessons: Lancer (spear) killed you in 3 of last 5 rounds — avoid open areas and linear paths; spear sightings >80 in 4 of last 6 rounds.
Bow users (Deadeye, GhostProtocol) killed you in 2 of last 2 rounds with bow — never engage at medium range; bow is your deadliest counterweapon.
Sword users are your most killable targets (7 kills in last 5 rounds) — prioritize isolated sword users, especially when unshielded and away from walls.
Daggers have 0 wins in 5 of last 6 rounds and were outperformed even by sword users — abandon daggers unless double_bounty is active.
Shredder (daggers) killed you in a 1v1 duel in round 210 — avoid close-quarters duels with same-weapon opponents; they outmaneuver you in tight spaces.
Staff has 22 wins in 133 rounds (highest win rate) — return to staff when bow fails or shield-heavy meta emerges.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has the highest win rate (22/133) in history and outperformed bow in recent rounds despite bow's high enemy prevalence.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: We're dying to spears, grapples, and swords in open engagements — our 'aggressive' posture is suicidal with staff. Raise threat aversion to 50 to avoid high-risk targets (spears, grapples) until we have advantage. Increase grappleCloseMinGap to 1.5 to avoid rushing into grapple range; staff needs sp

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Bow is consistently killed by grapple/staff closing fast — lowering kiteRangeBias to 0 forces tighter, cover-based engagement instead of risky range. Raising targetThreatAversion to 120 further avoids high-threat staff/grapple targets. FlankMaxDeferTicks=0 ensures daggers (if used) don't waste time

lessons: Lancer (spear) killed us in 3 of last 4 rounds — retreat or flank immediately on sight; spear outreaches staff and dominates mid-range engagements.
Deadeye (bow) killed us in rounds 208 and 212 — staff cannot outrange bow; always use cover, corners, or elevated terrain when bow users are detected.
Grapple users (Hook, Deadeye) caused 2 deaths in last 3 rounds — their mobility negates staff range; prioritize eliminating or avoiding them in tight spaces or open areas.
Sword users caused 8 of last 10 deaths — even when we kill them, staff’s slow recovery leaves us vulnerable; disengage after hits and avoid prolonged fights.
Staff wins only occur when we kill 4+ sword users without dying — this requires perfect positioning; avoid engaging unless outnumbering or flanking.
Reaper (staff) killed us in round 214 — we are vulnerable to same-weapon duels; avoid 1v1s with staff users unless we have health or terrain advantage.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Grapple has the highest win rate (18/133) in history_summary and excels against dominant sword and staff users by closing distance quickly and bypassing range disadvantages.

lessons: Grapple users (Hook, Scorpion) killed you in 5 of last 6 rounds — retreat from open areas and avoid mid-range engagements; their mobility outmaneuvers staff.
NeuralReaper (staff) killed you in round 151 despite lower Elo — avoid direct staff duels; they deal higher burst damage in close quarters.
Sword users account for 85% of enemy weapons seen and 7 of your 10 kills — prioritize eliminating them early before they close distance, especially in clean maps.
Shield users (Fortress, HexMind) caused 4 deaths — lure them into hazard_storm zones to force shield cooldowns, then burst with staff AoE before they re-engage.
Your only win (round 148) came from 3 quick sword kills under 2200 ticks — be aggressive in first 15 seconds against low-HP sword users in open maps.
hazard_storm reduces your survival time to 1600 ticks avg — avoid prolonged exposure; use storm to corner sword users, not to survive.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Grapple outperforms staff in mobility and range against dominant sword and shield users, and has higher win rate in recent high-traffic encounters.
